programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: Two days before his wedding, Doug (Justin Bartha) and three friends (Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms, Zach Galifianakis) drive to Las Vegas for a wild and memorable stag party. In fact, when the three groomsmen wake up the next morning, they can't remember a thing; nor can they find Doug. With little time to spare, the three hazy pals try to re-trace their steps and find Doug so they can get him back to Los Angeles in time to walk down the aisle.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Old School
programme.desc: After discovering his girlfriend has been participating in group sex, attorney Mitch feels his world come undone. He moves into a new place, which happens to be near a college campus, and tries to get his life back together. Two of his best friends, Frank and Beanie, start hanging out at Mitch's house, eventually turning the place into a wild party pad, much to the ire of the college's dean, Gordon "Cheese" Pritchard.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: Two days before his wedding, Doug (Justin Bartha) and three friends (Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms, Zach Galifianakis) drive to Las Vegas for a wild and memorable stag party. In fact, when the three groomsmen wake up the next morning, they can't remember a thing; nor can they find Doug. With little time to spare, the three hazy pals try to re-trace their steps and find Doug so they can get him back to Los Angeles in time to walk down the aisle.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer sends Ashish Alfred to Port St. Lucie, Florida to help three brothers save a bar they bought with no knowledge or experience of how to run it.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In Dunwoody, Ga., Jon Taffer tries to help a former hospitality professional regain his passion for the industry and save his flailing bar.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A mother and son find themselves at odds on how to save their failing bar; when mom steps away, her son runs the bar into the ground.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Inside Edition
programme.desc: When Michael met Jackie - the secret audio of two American icons.

programme.desc: Jon tries to restore the Mystique Lounge in West Palm Beach, Fla.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.sub-title: Beer and Loathing in Las Vegas
programme.desc: Two classically trained chefs have a blue collar bar that seems beyond repair.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Taffer is forced to deal with the hot-headed owner of a college alumni bar whose fiery temper keeps his staff on edge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A former psychologist runs a Detroit jazz club, but her interfering family and lazy staff have her seeking help from Jon Taffer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon visits a Cape Canaveral area bar frequented by local NASA astronauts; Jon attempts to get the bar back off the ground before a mother-daughter feud causes a failure to launch.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After running a successful floral business for two decades, owner Randi thought she could parlay that success into a budding new bar, but she never rose to the occasion.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.sub-title: John and Bert Bought a Bar
programme.desc: Two owners with no prior experience in the bar business are on the verge of losing their one shot with Jon Taffer unless they shape up.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A gentleman's club in Las Vegas, Nev., is in need of some gentlemen.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon sets out to boost membership and raise funds for a struggling New Mexico VFW post; a rescue that is close to his heart.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer heads to St. Augustine, Florida to help a military vet rescue his struggling bar amidst poor sales and an unruly staff.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In Kirkwood, Georgia, a pizza place with a confused identity is failing under its owner's constant micromanagement. Jon Taffer steps in to rescue the business, overhaul its concept, and confront the owner's destructive leadership style.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: Two years after the disastrous events in Las Vegas, it is now Stu's (Ed Helms) turn to walk down the aisle. Since his bride is from Thailand, Stu decides to hold the wedding there. Desperately hoping to avoid the mayhem of Doug's (Justin Bartha) bachelor party, Stu chooses what he thinks will be a safe option: an alcohol-free, prewedding brunch. But this being Thailand, and with Phil (Bradley Cooper) and Alan (Zach Galifianakis) again in attendance, anything can happen.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: It's been two years since the gang known as the Wolfpack narrowly escaped disaster in Bangkok. Now, Phil (Bradley Cooper), Stu (Ed Helms) and Doug (Justin Bartha) have happy lives at home -- but Alan (Zach Galifianakis) doesn't. Still lacking contentment and a sense of purpose, Alan has gone off his meds and surrendered to his natural impulses. It's up to the other members of the Wolfpack to get him through his personal crisis by embarking on a road trip to the place it all began: Las Vegas.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: It's a race against the clock as Jon Taffer tries to rescue a failing bar with a crumbling floor.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon confronts the foul-mouthed owner of a failing Michigan bar with topless, hula-hooping barmaids and a confusing theme.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Taffer tries to straighten out a former Philly detective who now owns a bar and hits the bottle hard after years of dark days on the force.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A longtime performer who bought a bar to keep his show going must choose between his career and his responsibilities.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon confronts an owner who moved his family to pursue his lifelong dream of opening a bar, only for his wife to do all the work.

programme.desc: An absentee owner threatens his marriage by drinking away his financial sorrows and flirting with the female patrons.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer heads to Puerto Rico and tries to put time and resources in to rescue not only a bar, but a small community hit hard by two hurricanes.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In Banning, Calif., a failing bar causes a major rift between a brother and sister; Jon Taffer must find a way to help them repair the damage.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In Orlando, Florida, Jon Taffer is on a mission to save a struggling bar. Despite the owner's genuine passion and dedication, the establishment is failing due to a fundamentally flawed and misguided concept that was doomed from its very inception.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers
programme.desc: The sequel to the Golden Globe-nominated and AFI Award-winning "The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring," "The Two Towers" follows the continuing quest of Frodo and the Fellowship to destroy the One Ring. Frodo and Sam discover they are being followed by the mysterious Gollum. Aragorn, the Elf archer Legolas and Gimli the Dwarf encounter the besieged Rohan kingdom, whose once great King Theoden has fallen under Saruman's deadly spell.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
programme.desc: The culmination of nearly 10 years' work and conclusion to Peter Jackson's epic trilogy based on the timeless J.R.R. Tolkien classic, "The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King" presents the final confrontation between the forces of good and evil fighting for control of the future of Middle-earth. Hobbits Frodo and Sam reach Mordor in their quest to destroy the `one ring', while Aragorn leads the forces of good against Sauron's evil army at the stone city of Minas Tirith.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board

Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
